'''Sprig Cheever''' (nicknamed '''Cheeve''') was a bearded [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[KeyBed]] player of a [[Band/Legends|band]] at [[Happy's Landing]] on [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]].

==Biography==
He was the partner of the [[Band/Legends|band's]] [[Musician/Legends|singer]], [[Twilit Hearth]]. The couple helped [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin]] hide from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] detection when I'att took to the stage in Hearth's place.

{{Char-stub}}
